summary: Planned one conservative non-mutating classification per PR inventory item. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Already-closed PRs are kept closed; hydrated open PRs are kept independent for maintainer review, proof follow-up, or normal PR handling. Missing hydrated live state for five listed PRs is scoped to those refs only.
